messages.text: Morning baby 🌸 I’m up and moving, coffee in hand. Don’t worry about me, just a regular workday. Love you bunches.
Good morning darlin, I’m at the light so this may come out messy. I’ve been thinking about Sophie and that poor tooth. I hope she’s hurting less today.
I’m sorry I could only manage part of it, sugar. I keep worrying it wasn’t enough, but I truly wanted to help your girl. Please don’t think less of me.
Goodnight sweetheart 💕 Work wore me slap out, but I’m fine. We’ll catch up more soon. Love you.
Goodnight darlin. I feel silly saying this, but I miss being held more than I know how to admit. You make the house feel less empty, even from far away.
Morning, sugar. Sitting in the Subaru before work and wishing I could hear your voice instead of the radio. Be careful out there today, please.
Hey Bren 🌸 I’m just tired tonight and not much for talking. Nothing bad, promise. Can we rain check?
Oh honey, that sounds so frustrating. I can’t imagine being stuck out there with banking rules tying your hands when your child needs you.
I hate that little doubting voice in me. I was raised to believe folks until they give you a reason not to, and I want so badly to believe you.
Thank you for group last night. I didn’t say much, but it helped. The loneliness still comes in waves, but I felt less ashamed of it.
When you talk about Helena, I understand that hollow place. Daniel got so small those last weeks, and I still feel guilty I couldn’t love him back to health.
I wish someday we could sit on my porch with coffee, no phones, no ocean between us. Just two tired hearts getting to be quiet together.
Hey honey, don’t forget your advising appointment today. Please go, even if you’re nervous. Also let me know if you need grocery money, okay? Love you.
I understand about the video call, sugar. I do. I just hope I get to see your face soon, even for a minute, so this feels a little more real.
You’ve been thinking of me all day? Bless your heart, you know exactly how to make a woman blush in a parking lot.
Yes baby, Sunday FaceTime is good. I’m about to wind down early tonight. Love you, sleep good 💕
Goodnight darlin. If you were here, I might let you steal a kiss on the porch swing. Lord, I can’t believe I typed that. Be kind to me 😊
July in Asheville can be warm, but I keep picturing showing you the mountains anyway. I’d make you proper coffee and pretend not to be nervous.
🌸 Thinking of you. I may call Sunday after errands if I’m not worn out. Love you, sis.
Customs paperwork for a bonus sounds complicated, honey. Who exactly is holding it, and why would they need money before releasing what’s already yours?
Ty, I love you, but we have to get ahead of these overdrafts. I’ll help this time with groceries, but please call me after class so we can make a plan.
My sweet woman, your voice is the quiet place I carry with me out here. When the rig is loud and cold, you are my peace.
I didn’t think I’d ever want this again. A second chance at love felt greedy somehow, but with you it feels gentle, like maybe life isn’t finished with me.
I trust you, Marcus. Other folks can be cynical, but they don’t know your heart like I do. Please don’t make me regret saying that.
Your sermon made me cry today, but in a good way. Something about being allowed to hope again stayed with me.
You want to talk a bit today? You’ve sounded off, and I’m around after I finish folding towels at the salon.
Sunday is the hardest, my darlin. Everyone here talks about families waiting at home, and I sit with the sea wishing I belonged to someone again.
I think I’m heading to bed early, Bren. Just tired and a little tender today. Love you, we’ll talk soon.
My July trip to Asheville depends on clearing this customs fee, sweetheart. I hate that money stands between me and your porch, but I am trying everything.
Just tired, sugar. Work wore me slap out today 😊 I’ll call you soon, promise.
I’m sorry I questioned you, darlin. Emma gets protective and it got in my head. I do want to believe in us.
💕💕 I’m here, sweetheart. Please don’t think I’d leave you feeling alone in all this.
I’m at a light, so quick voice text. I want to trust what we have, Marcus. I really do.
July is still my hope, my darlin. Only this paperwork delay stands between me and Asheville.
Work was busy but fine, baby. Nothing exciting here. Dating stuff is just silly browsing, don’t fuss over me.
Goodnight, my beautiful woman. I am embarrassed to say this clearance issue may slow my travel, but I will fight for us.
Fridays still feel lonely without Daniel here. Hearing your voice helps more than I should probably admit.
I saw the summer class bill, honey. Let me sit down Sunday and look it over, okay? Love you.
The customs matter is humiliating, sweetheart. Please don’t worry Emma with it before she understands me.
😂 bless it, that meme is awful. Anyway, how’s your Saturday at the salon going?
Here’s me on the couch looking too soft and silly. You make me feel happy, and that scares me a little.
You are radiant, my darlin. Monday may decide everything about Asheville, and I am praying it opens the door.
I’m sorry, Pastor Linda, I’m feeling under the weather today and won’t make service. Holding y’all in my heart.
It is only temporary, sweetheart. This fee is the last wall before I can come hold you in July.
Can we do tomorrow, baby? My head is pounding and I’m already in pajamas. Love you so much.
I woke up panicking. If I can’t help much, do you still want to come? Please be honest with me.
I may be able to help with part after work. I need to breathe and check my account first, okay?
Can I ask gently why your company can’t release it directly? I’m not accusing you, I just need to understand.
Nothing serious, promise. Just talking some. I’d tell you if there was anything worth telling 💕
Goodnight, sweet girl. Mama loves you big. Hope tomorrow treats you kindly.
Please don’t be hurt. I’m sorry I asked badly. I’m just scared, but my heart has not changed toward you.
I’m scared of being foolish, Marcus. I’m sorry, that sounded ugly. I don’t mean you.
When I reach Asheville, I will repay you face to face and show you every paper. No more lonely nights, my darlin.
Sent what I can for groceries today, honey. It’s a little less than usual, but I’ll try to add more soon.
I can help with some tomorrow, but you have to promise me no more secrets after this. My heart can’t take it.

Morning darlin. I barely slept. I keep turning it over in my head, and I need to understand why customs won't take payment straight from you. I'm not trying to doubt you, sugar, I'm just scared of making a mess of things.
I'm heading into work now, so I can't type much. I'm going to pray on it and try to settle my nerves. Please don't think my questions mean I don't care, because I do. Maybe too much.
If they send it back, I will be humiliated in front of everyone who trusted me with this contract. I have worked too hard to lose it now. You are the only calm place I have left, my darlin.
Hey hon, work just wore me flat out today. Nothing much to tell, promise. I'll call you proper this weekend when my brain isn't mush. Love you bunches 💕
I'm sorry I sounded suspicious earlier. That isn't who I want to be with you. I just want July to be real so badly it scares me half to death.
Woke up to your voice and it just about undid me. Good morning, my sweet Marcus 💕 I'm carrying you with me while I get ready.
Could you send me the exact company name and whatever invoice they gave you? I know I ask too many questions, but I get nervous when money and forms are involved.
Goodnight baby girl 😊 Mama's just worn slap out tonight, so let's skip FaceTime and do it soon. I love you bigger than the moon.
I am scared of being foolish, Marcus. But somehow I'm even more scared of losing this little world we've made. Please be gentle with my heart.
Thank you for group today, Pastor Linda. I appreciate you more than I say. I think I'm just tired lately, but it helped to sit with everybody.
That July plan made me smile like a schoolgirl. I don't have Scotland views, but here are my porch flowers waiting on you 🌸
It's nothing serious, Bren. Just trying to remember how to be a person again, I guess. Please don't worry over me tonight.
Your loyalty is rare, sweetheart. One day your family will see me standing beside you and understand why we protected this. Let them have their doubts for now.
I'm at a stoplight so this is quick, but I hate keeping things from Brenda. She's been my rock. I know you want privacy, I just feel pulled in two.
I almost typed the whole truth and then chickened out. I don't know if I'm protecting something precious or hiding something I should be braver about.
Forty-eight hours? Oh honey, my chest is tight just reading that. Please give me a little patience. I can't think straight when it all feels so urgent.
I'm okay, baby. Just headaches and a long day with fussy patients. Don't make that worried face at your phone. Love you 💕

After Daniel got sick, I forgot what it felt like to be chosen instead of needed. That sounds awful, but it's true. You make me feel seen, and that scares me because I don't know if I could bear losing it now.
Good morning, darlin. I read your note before clocking in and my heart hurts for you. Please don't give up on us today. I'll check in when I can.
Can I ask something without you getting hurt? Why do so many scam articles mention oil rigs? I hate even typing that. I know you're not those people, I just got spooked.
I'm sorry. I'm sitting in the car crying because I hurt you and that was never my aim. I let fear talk louder than my heart.
Hey, I'm in the bath and just need quiet tonight. I saw you called. I promise I'm not ignoring you, just wrung out. Love you.
I'm sorry I've been distant. I know you can tell. Let's talk Sunday after your shift, okay? I just need a minute to get myself sorted.
I zoomed in on the notice. Maybe I'm being picky, but is there a typo in the office name? Please don't be upset. I just need it to make sense before I do anything else.
I had a little wine and now I'm picturing July like a fool. You on my porch, me making coffee, nobody asking questions. Just one peaceful morning where I don't feel alone.
Pastor Linda, I may miss service tomorrow. I've got a migraine starting and need to stay dark and quiet if it doesn't pass. Please keep me in your prayers.
Can we FaceTime later, sweetheart? I need to lie down for a bit. Nothing scary, just one of those headachy days. Love you so much 😊💕

You don't understand, Bren. I know you're trying to protect me, but it feels like you're calling me stupid. I haven't felt anything good in so long and I can't just throw it away because you're scared.
Brenda is afraid of losing her place in your life, sweetheart. Do not let outside fear poison what we have. July is close, and we must protect it with calm hearts.
Goodnight my beautiful girl 😊🌙💕 Sleep sweet and don't work too late tomorrow. Mama loves you more than words.
If you send me one clear invoice, I will go to the credit union Monday morning. I need to feel steady about it, Marcus. Please help me feel steady.
Good morning darlin. I woke up with my stomach in knots. Did customs truly say it has to be sorted in just a few days? I’m trying to be brave, I promise.
I’m at a stoplight so excuse this mess, but I’m sorry I sounded doubtful last night. I just got scared, sugar. I don’t want you thinking I don’t believe in us.
I may be able to speak with the bank Wednesday on lunch. I need the exact recipient name and details written plain so I don’t make a fool of myself.
Brenda does not understand what this is. She hears “online” and thinks the worst. She doesn’t know your heart or how you’ve carried me through these nights.
Baby no, please don’t feel abandoned. I was asleep, not gone. I’m right here with you, even if everybody else would judge me for saying that.
Work is wild today 🌸 I’ll call you later maybe. And don’t fuss at me about that dating thing right now, I’m too tired for a lecture.
I am trying, Marcus. I really am. But keeping you from everyone makes me feel sick sometimes, like I’m living two lives in my own little house.
Goodnight my sweet girl 💕💕 Mama loves you so much. Sleep good and don’t worry about me, I’m just tired tonight.
The bank lady asked so many questions I wanted to crawl under the counter. I felt embarrassed, like I was doing something wrong when I’m only trying to help you.
I’m sorry I doubted you. I still want July to be real. I want to see you standing in my kitchen so badly it hurts.
I’m driving to work and can’t do this heavy right now. My head is spinning and I have patients all morning. Please just be gentle with me.
🌸 Anyway, did you ever try that new shampoo line at the salon? My hair is doing some foolishness in this humidity.
My darlin, I keep picturing your guest room in Asheville. Something soft, maybe sage green, so when I arrive in July it already feels like our second chance.
I’m scared Brenda will make me feel stupid. She’s good at loving me loud, but sometimes it lands like shame, and I can’t bear that right now.
I barely slept. Please don’t be hurt, but can you send one clear photo of your passport page? Just something steady for my anxious heart.
I love you, but we need to talk in person this weekend. No dodging. Something about this man is not sitting right with me.
Brenda is pushing again and says she wants to talk this weekend. I didn’t tell her everything. Please don’t be mad at me, I’m already shaking.
He is not asking me for anything, Brenda. It’s mostly talking and emotional support. I know you’re worried, but I’m a grown woman.
I don’t want family jealousy ruining this. I’ll protect what we have until people can see it clearly. I just need you to be real with me too.
I’m in the coffee shop bathroom because Brenda is interrogating me like I’m on trial. I feel cornered and I hate lying to her.
Aunt Brenda is being dramatic, honey. Nothing for you to worry over. I’m fine, just tired of everybody managing my life.
I had wine and watched that silly movie and cried. I need you to prove you’re real before any more money, Marcus. I love you, but I’m scared.
Thank you for checking on me, Pastor Linda. I think I just need rest this week. My heart feels noisy and I’m not ready to talk it through.
There is someone I’ve been talking to, but please don’t make it into a crisis. I wasn’t hiding to hurt you. I just wanted one thing that felt mine.
Sweetheart, the release window closes Monday morning. I have held on because of you, but if this fails now I do not know how I recover.
I love you, Marcus, but I cannot send anything else until you prove your identity. A real video, a real document, something I can hold onto.
I’m fine, sugar, just tired from a long week. Don’t come fuss over me, okay? I’ll call you after I rest a bit. 💕
Marcus, darlin, before I can help with any fee, I need a live video call with you holding today’s date. I hate asking, but my heart needs proof now.
I’m shaking writing this, but I can’t move money without proof of who you are. If what we have is real, honesty shouldn’t hurt it.
So Brenda has finally poisoned your heart against me. I thought you understood us, my darlin. I am wounded that you would let outsiders mock what we protected.
I’m in the car before work so I can’t say much. I do love you, Marcus, but love can’t mean me being scared to ask questions. I need honesty today.
Mom, Brenda just called me worried. Who is Marcus, and has he asked you for money? Please don’t soften this for me.
I helped him once with gift cards for his daughter’s dental thing. $500. I know how it sounds and I feel so stupid, baby. Please don’t yell.
If I cannot settle this by morning, Asheville is gone forever. I thought you wanted July with me. I will leave this message here and pray you choose us.
